ticket.subject: Overcharged $350 in May - billed for Enterprise features on Starter plan
ticket.body: Our May statement charged us $449, but we're subscribed to the Starter plan at $99/month. I see unexpected charges: 'Premium support package $150', 'Advanced analytics module $120', and 'API rate limit increase $80'. We never requested these add-ons and our account settings show no upgrades. Please explain these line items or process a refund for the $350 difference.
